title: Siddhartha

oneLineHook: A book that doesn't just speak to you — it changes something within.

oneLineHook: When you want something, the universe aligns to help you.

oneLineHook: Every battle is first won in the mind.

oneLineHook: What if life could be more?

oneLineHook: Every revolution begins with purity and ends with politics.

title: Clear Thinking

oneLineHook: Clarity is not about brilliance, it is about avoiding avoidable mistakes.

oneLineHook: Leadership is not charisma, it is clarity and process.

oneLineHook: We live divided — chasing pleasure like Zorba or seeking silence like Buddha — but rarely whole.

oneLineHook: A breath of fresh air in the middle of life's noise.

oneLineHook: Practical wisdom that bridges life and business.

title: Poor Charlie's Almanack

oneLineHook: One of the most practical books I've read on personal growth.
